summary: Tested bug fix for rejected submissions not showing on Submissions page. The fix correctly keeps rejected submissions in MongoDB (removed delete_one call) and displays them with red 'Rejected' badge. All 6 test scenarios passed.
passed_tests: Backend API /api/admin/submissions?status=Rejected returns rejected submissions (1 found)
Specific test submission (Property ID: 3UVE25B1, Receiver: Test Speed) exists with status='Rejected'
Rejected submission contains review_remarks='Testing rejection visibility fix'
Status filter dropdown includes 'Rejected' option and API accepts it
Employee property detail endpoint excludes rejected submissions (allows re-submission)
Rejected submissions persist in database (not deleted)
Frontend displays rejected submission with red badge styling (bg-red-100 text-red-700)
Submission detail dialog shows 'Rejection Remarks' section with the rejection reason
Total count correctly shows '1 submissions' when filtered by Rejected status
critical_code_review_comments: Fix verified: Line 3426 in server.py has comment 'Keep the rejected submission for audit trail (do NOT delete)' - delete_one was removed
Property status correctly reset to 'Pending' (line 3425) allowing surveyors to re-submit
Employee endpoints (lines 4321, 4501-4505) correctly exclude rejected submissions with status: {$ne: 'Rejected'}
Frontend Submissions.js has proper red styling for Rejected badge (line 558: bg-red-100 text-red-700)
Rejection remarks display correctly in detail dialog (lines 1290-1295)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified: Rejected submissions now persist in MongoDB with status='Rejected'. The test submission (Property ID: 3UVE25B1, Receiver: Test Speed) is visible on Submissions page when filtered by 'Rejected' status. The property is reset to 'Pending' status allowing surveyors to re-submit. All backend and frontend functionality working correctly.

verified_fixes.bug_description: Rejected submissions were being deleted from MongoDB when admin rejected them, causing them to not appear on Submissions page
verified_fixes.root_cause: Line 3427 in server.py had delete_one() call that removed the submission document
verified_fixes.fix_applied: Removed delete_one call, submission now stays with status='Rejected' for audit trail
additional_changes: Property status reset to 'Pending' (not 'Rejected') so surveyor can re-submit
Employee property detail excludes rejected submissions (line 4321)
Employee submit excludes rejected submissions when finding existing (lines 4499-4506)
